headline: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) Misses Q2 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
summary: Consumer financial services company Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026 as sales only rose 2% year on year to $3.72 billion. Its GAAP profit of $2.59 per share was 21.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
